treatments.post_content: Laser hair removal for the upper lip area. Quick and effective treatment for unwanted facial hair.
Laser hair removal for the chin area. Ideal for removing stubborn chin hair.
Laser hair removal for the sides of the face including sideburns and cheeks.
Complete facial laser hair removal covering upper lip, chin, sides of face, and forehead.
Laser hair removal for the front or back of the neck.
Laser hair removal for both underarms. One of our most popular treatments.
Laser hair removal for lower arms (wrist to elbow) or upper arms (elbow to shoulder).
Complete laser hair removal for both arms from shoulder to wrist.
Laser hair removal for hands and fingers.
Standard bikini line laser hair removal along the underwear line.
Extended bikini laser hair removal - covers more area than standard bikini line.
Brazilian laser hair removal - removes most pubic hair leaving a small strip or triangle.
Hollywood laser hair removal - complete removal of all pubic hair.
Laser hair removal for the perianal area.
Laser hair removal for the buttocks area.
Laser hair removal for lower legs (ankle to knee) or upper legs (knee to thigh).
Complete laser hair removal for both legs from ankle to thigh.
Laser hair removal for feet and toes.
Laser hair removal for the stomach/abdominal area.
Laser hair removal for the lower back area.
Complete facial laser hair removal for men including cheeks, beard line, and neck.
Laser hair removal for men's neck area - front and/or back.
Laser hair removal for men's shoulders.
Laser hair removal for men's chest area.
Laser hair removal for men's stomach/abdominal area.
Complete laser hair removal for men's back from shoulders to waist.
Laser hair removal for men's underarms.
Complete laser hair removal for men's arms from shoulder to wrist.
Standard bikini line laser hair removal for men.
Brazilian laser hair removal for men.
Hollywood laser hair removal for men - complete removal of all pubic hair.
Complete laser hair removal for men's legs from ankle to thigh.
Essential full body laser hair removal package for women. Includes: Underarms, Full Arms, Full Legs, Brazilian or Hollywood, Buttocks. Excludes face, neck, chest, abs, shoulders and back.

Ultimate full body laser hair removal package for women. Includes ALL areas: Full Face, Neck, Underarms, Full Arms, Hands & Fingers, Full Legs, Feet & Toes, Brazilian or Hollywood, Buttocks, Perianal, Stomach, Lower Back.
Full legs and full arms laser hair removal package. Perfect for achieving smooth limbs.
Popular combination package including Brazilian and Underarms laser hair removal.
Complete face and neck laser hair removal package for women.
Essential full body laser hair removal for men. Includes: Shoulders, Chest, Abs, Full Back, Underarms, Full Arms.
Ultimate full body laser hair removal for men. Includes ALL areas.
Popular combination package for men including chest and full back laser hair removal.
